channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 Rubio Offers Cuba New Relationship with $100 Million in Aid
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio offered to forge a new relationship with Cuba in a video message, proposing $100 million in aid and blaming Cuban leaders for shortages of electricity, food and fuel.

item.title: 🇬🇧📉 UK Inflation Cools More Than Expected in April
item.description: British inflation fell more than expected in April, but the slowdown masks a tough outlook for households as Iran war-related costs are set to hit consumers harder later this year.

item.title: 🇩🇪🏦 Commerzbank Staff and Executives Resist UniCredit Takeover Bid
item.description: Employees, executives and some investors criticized UniCredit takeover attempt at the German banks shareholder meeting, maintaining resistance to the cross-border deal.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇱🇹 Kremlin Slams Lithuania Minister Comments on Kaliningrad as Insane
item.description: The Kremlin called remarks by Lithuanias foreign minister "verging on insanity" after he said NATO should show Moscow it was capable of penetrating the Russian exclave of Kaliningrad.

item.title: 🇶🇦✈️ Qatar Airways Profit Falls 7% as Iran War Hits Global Network
item.description: State-owned Qatar Airways posted a more than 7% decline in annual net profit but flagged progress in rebuilding its global schedule as it navigates the impact of the Iran war.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Somaliland to open embassy in Jerusalem after Israel becomes first to recognize breakaway state
item.description: The self-declared republic announced it will establish an embassy in Jerusalem following Israel's recognition in December 2025, with Israel planning to reciprocate by opening an embassy in Hargeisa.

item.title: 🛢️ US seizes Iran-linked oil tanker in Indian Ocean carrying over one million barrels
item.description: The US seized a sanctioned Iranian oil tanker in the Indian Ocean, the Wall Street Journal reported. The vessel had loaded crude at Iran's Kharg Island in February.

item.title: 🚢 Handful of tankers still crossing Hormuz despite conflict, using transponder tricks
item.description: About 19 non-Iranian tankers have successfully transited the Strait of Hormuz since March, with Greek firm Dynacom using tactics like disabling transponders and sailing at night to avoid attacks.

item.title: 🛢️ Gulf states accelerate overland pipeline deals to bypass Hormuz chokepoint
item.description: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt and Syria are fast-tracking pipeline and logistics agreements to create a Levant-Gulf corridor, fundamentally reshaping regional energy trade routes amid the strait closure.

item.title: ⚠️ Iran threatens to spread war beyond Middle East if US attacks
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that any renewed US or Israeli attacks would be met with retaliation far beyond the region, after Trump said he came within an hour of restarting military operations.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Xi and Putin signal united front against Washington in Beijing talks
item.description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin demonstrated a united front against the US during their Beijing meeting, deepening strategic cooperation between the two powers amid tensions with Washington.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US expected to announce criminal charges against Cuba's Raul Castro
item.description: The Trump administration is expected to announce criminal charges against former Cuban President Raul Castro as part of an intensified pressure campaign against the communist government.

item.title: 🇮🇩🛢️ Indonesia unveils plan to centralise control of commodity exports
item.description: Indonesia announced a sweeping plan to centralise exports of key commodities like palm oil and coal through a state agency, aiming to boost government revenue through tighter control of natural resource sales.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Senate Advances Resolution to Limit Trump's Iran War Powers
item.description: The US Senate moved forward with a bipartisan resolution requiring congressional approval before extending military action against Iran, a significant check on presidential war-making authority.

item.title: 🇱🇹 Lithuania Issues Air Danger Warning as Drone Violates Airspace
item.description: Lithuania suspended flights at Vilnius airport and moved top officials to safety after a drone violated national airspace, underscoring heightened security concerns on NATO's eastern flank.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Xi and Putin Unite Against US on Nuclear and Security Issues
item.description: Chinese and Russian leaders met in Beijing days after Trump's visit, stressing their "unyielding" ties and criticizing US security policies including the "Golden Dome" missile defense program.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 US Plans to Shrink Forces Available to NATO During Crises
item.description: The Trump administration will tell NATO allies it plans to reduce the pool of US military capabilities available for alliance defense during major crises, three sources familiar with the matter said.

item.title: 💰 US Imposes Fresh Sanctions on Iranian Exchange House and Shadow Fleet
item.description: The Trump administration sanctioned an Iranian foreign currency exchange house and front companies overseeing transactions for Iranian banks, maintaining financial pressure on Tehran.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland says US troop deployment delayed, not canceled
item.description: Polands defence minister said no decisions have been made to reduce American troops in the country and recent US moves may only temporarily delay their deployment.

item.title: 🌏 Foreign selling in Asian equities rises as bond yields climb
item.description: Foreign selling in Asian equities has accelerated in May as investors turn cautious over war-driven inflation and higher borrowing costs on corporate margins across the region.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Analysis: China is investable again, for the nimble
item.description: Sentiment towards Chinas $20 trillion economy is no longer at rock bottom. Fund allocations are recovering and foreign investment is rising as Chinas innovation edge helps.

item.title: 🇹🇷⛽ Türkiye proposes NATO military fuel pipeline to strengthen eastern flank
item.description: Türkiye Defense Ministry announced a cost-efficient military fuel pipeline proposal for NATO that would strengthen the alliance's eastern flank. Germany will rotate Patriot systems in Türkiye amid Middle East crisis.

item.title: 🇵🇰🇮🇷 Pakistan interior minister visits Tehran for second time in a week amid Iran-US mediation
item.description: Pakistan's Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi arrived in Tehran for his second visit in less than a week, continuing diplomatic efforts amid Iran-US tensions. Pakistan has positioned itself as a potential mediator.

item.title: 🥶⚔️ Russia and China express concern over US militarization of Arctic
item.description: Russia and China jointly expressed concern over what they described as growing militarization of the Arctic by the US and its allies, highlighting another area of geopolitical friction between the powers.

item.title: 🇯🇵🧲 Japan feels squeeze as China rare earth magnet exports only partly recover
item.description: China's exports of rare earth magnets to Japan recovered only modestly, with Japanese firms warning of severe supply pressures. Japan remains dependent on Chinese rare earth materials critical for electronics and defense.
